ksas.statement: Knowledge of enterprise transformation program design, including operating model change, capability maturity progression, transformation roadmap construction, and change sequencing principles.
Knowledge of data and AI organizational design patterns, including centralized CoE, federated, and hub-and-spoke models, and the conditions under which each is appropriate.
Skill in building executive alignment for data and AI transformation programs, including stakeholder mapping, coalition building, and resistant stakeholder engagement.

Skill in designing transformation roadmaps that sequence capability development logically, with dependencies identified, quick wins positioned early, and long-term structural changes sequenced appropriately.
Design and lead enterprise data and AI transformation programs, including operating model redesign, capability development roadmaps, and organizational change management.
Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
Knowledge of current frontiers in machine learning and AI research, including recent advances in foundation models, reinforcement learning, causal ML, and AI safety research.
Knowledge of experimental design for ML research, including ablation study design, statistical significance in ML evaluation, benchmark construction, and reproducibility standards.
Skill in designing and executing applied research projects with clear organizational relevance, balancing research rigor with practical applicability.
Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical audiences, including paper writing, conference presentation, and internal briefing formats.
Design and execute research projects that advance organizational AI capability, including hypothesis formulation, experimental design, execution, and findings documentation.
Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
Knowledge of AI capability landscape, including current capabilities and limitations of generative AI, predictive AI, and autonomous systems as applied to enterprise business problems.
Knowledge of innovation program design, including ideation methods, prototype development approaches, value hypothesis construction, and stage-gate evaluation criteria.
Skill in evaluating AI use case feasibility, including data availability assessment, technical complexity estimation, and business value quantification.
Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive audiences, communicating capability, limitations, and path to production.
Manage the enterprise AI innovation pipeline, including ideation facilitation, use case triage, prototype development prioritization, and POC results communication.
Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting technical approach, results, limitations, and production readiness assessment.
Knowledge of data and AI maturity assessment frameworks and how to diagnose organizational capability gaps across strategy, governance, architecture, talent, and culture dimensions.
Knowledge of data and AI business case construction, including value driver identification, benefit quantification methods, investment sizing, and risk-adjusted return analysis.
Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including stakeholder interviews, artifact review, maturity scoring, and finding synthesis.
Skill in developing actionable data and AI strategy recommendations, including prioritized roadmaps, capability investment plans, and organizational design recommendations.
Conduct data and AI strategy engagements, including current state assessment, future state design, gap analysis, and roadmap development with defined milestones and investment estimates.
Develop and present executive-level data and AI strategy recommendations, including business case, risk assessment, and implementation sequencing rationale.
